hero_sub: Built on innovation and driven by performance, Drytac has spent 50 years evolving from finished goods into a global manufacturer engineering high-performance materials through adhesive science.
story_p1: Fifty years ago, Drytac began with a simple realization: the material behind the work could be just as important as the work itself.
story_p2: Richard Kelley was making table mats, coasters, and plaques when a local picture framer asked to buy a roll of the dry mounting tissue he was using. One roll became two — and the numbers spoke for themselves. The future wasn't in table mats. It was in helping others mount, finish, and protect their graphics.
story_p3: That pivot defined the business. Today, Drytac is a global manufacturer, engineering its own products and delivering reliable, high-performance solutions through adhesive science.
origin_heading: A name born from the craft.
origin_p1: Before Drytac, the business operated as Lisle Industries — a one-person operation producing table mats and plaques.
origin_p2: As demand for dry mounting tissue grew, it became clear the future wasn't in finished products, but in supplying the materials behind them.
